ListItem.Para: Alternate procedures are established and used.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the inoperative nose wheel TPIS and use a tire pressure gauge to measure tire pressure (AMM DDG 32-49-01).

ListItem.Para: Deactivate the inoperative nose wheel TPIS.
Open the P600 panel circuit breaker EBPSU-C2-BSCU.
Open the P600 panel circuit breaker EBPSU-C2-EBAC.
Install the NLG axle RDC connector cover from dispatch tool K32036 on the wire bundle plug.

Note.Para: An appropriate cap and stow procedure may be used in lieu of dispatch tool availability.

ListItem.Para: Close the P600 panel circuit breaker EBPSU-C2-EBAC.
Close the P600 panel circuit breaker EBPSU-C2-BSCU.
Use a tire pressure gauge to measure tire pressure.

DispatchCondition.Title: Procedures Do Not Require Its Use

ListItem.Para: Procedures do not require its use.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the inoperative nose wheel TPIS (AMM DDG 32-49-01).

ListItem.Para: Open the P600 panel circuit breaker EBPSU-C2-BSCU.
Open the P600 panel circuit breaker EBPSU-C2-EBAC.
Install the NLG axle RDC connector cover from dispatch tool K32036 on the wire bundle plug.

Note.Para: An appropriate cap and stow procedure may be used in lieu of dispatch tool availability.

ListItem.Para: Close the P600 panel circuit breaker EBPSU-C2-EBAC.
Close the P600 panel circuit breaker EBPSU-C2-BSCU.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative provided alternate procedures are established and used.

Note.Para: Any portion of the system which operates normally may be used.
For dispatch with a missing main landing gear axle RDC, the associated axle RDC magnetic ring/flux link may also be broken or missing.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Use a tire pressure gauge to measure tire pressure (AMM DDG 32-49-01).

DispatchCondition.Title: Procedures Do Not Require Its Use

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative provided procedures do not require its use.

MaintenanceNote.Para: For dispatch with a missing main landing gear axle RDC, the associated axle RDC magnetic ring/flux link may also be broken or missing.
